summary: Beta Mode feature testing completed successfully. All backend APIs work correctly and frontend UI properly shows lock icons, password dialogs, and admin bypass functionality.

minor.issue: Missing 'Body' import from FastAPI caused server startup failure - FIXED by adding import

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: server.py line 1 was missing 'Body' import from FastAPI, causing NameError on startup
Console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key user_admin_001' - duplicate key in user list rendering (minor, non-blocking)
seed_data_creation: Created test user 'betatestuser@example.com' for non-admin beta mode testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Beta Mode feature is fully functional. Backend APIs: GET /api/beta-status (public), POST /api/beta-verify (public), GET/PUT /api/admin/beta-settings (admin only). Frontend: SportSelection.jsx shows lock icons for beta-locked sports, password dialog works correctly, admin users bypass restrictions. Test user 'betatestuser' can be used for non-admin testing.

backend_apis.GET /api/beta-status: PASS - Returns basketball_beta and football_beta flags
backend_apis.POST /api/beta-verify: PASS - Validates password for locked sports
backend_apis.PUT /api/admin/beta-settings: PASS - Updates beta mode settings (admin only)

frontend_ui.admin_dashboard_beta_settings: PASS - Toggle switches and password inputs work
frontend_ui.sport_selection_lock_icon: PASS - Lock icon appears for non-admin users on beta sports
frontend_ui.sport_selection_admin_bypass: PASS - Admin users see no lock and can access directly
frontend_ui.password_dialog: PASS - Dialog appears, wrong password rejected, correct password unlocks
frontend_ui.session_storage_unlock: PASS - Unlocked sports stored in sessionStorage
